name: odoo-semantic
description: Odoo / Viindoo AI workforce toolkit — 22 skill personas + 6 workflow commands across engineering, sales, marketing, strategy, and onboarding. Pairs with the OSM (odoo-semantic) MCP server for indexed-codebase grounding.

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: Odoo Semantic API key (starts with osm_). Get one from your server admin or https://odoo-semantic.viindoo.com/install/. If Claude Code does not prompt for this value during install (known v2.1.x bug — github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/39455), run /odoo-semantic:connect after install instead.

mcp_url.title: MCP Server URL
mcp_url.description: Base URL of your Odoo Semantic MCP server
